mapper.select: SELECT * FROM WATCHLIST WHERE ci_value_hash = #{ciValueHash} AND deleted_yn = 'N' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM WATCHLIST WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY registered_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WATCHLIST ( name, birth_date, ci_value, ci_value_hash, birth_date_hash, reason, risk_level, registered_by, registered_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{birthDate, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, #{ciValue, typeHandler=AesTypeHandler}, #{ciValueHash}, #{birthDateHash}, #{reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{riskLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{registeredBy}, #{registeredAt}, 'N' )
